name: Morning Reflections Show - Segment Ideas
description: Inspiration boards for upcoming WGSP 1490 AM segments. Scripture imagery, guest topic visuals, and listener story themes.

name: Faith & Devotional Life
description: Scripture artwork, prayer journal prompts, devotional quotes, and contemplative photography for daily quiet time.

name: Sunday Comfort Cooking
description: Pot roast, mac and cheese, fried chicken, sweet potato pie, peach cobbler, and cornbread recipes for Sunday dinner at home.

name: Cooper-Young Garden
description: Zinnias, black-eyed Susans, lavender, rosemary, and bird feeder ideas for the backyard garden of a 1920s Midtown Memphis craftsman bungalow.

name: Books Worth Reading
description: Titles I have on the nightstand or want to get from Midtown Pages. Theology, memoir, fiction - Barbara Kingsolver, Henri Nouwen, Howard Thurman, Brené Brown.

name: Chaplaincy & Pastoral Care Resources
description: CPE education materials, palliative care frameworks, spiritual care articles, and Association of Professional Chaplains continuing-education resources.

name: Saturday Yoga & Wellness
description: YouTube yoga flows, Greenline trail photos, mindful morning routines, and gentle movement inspiration.

name: Radio Show Promo - Private Planning
description: Private board for upcoming episode graphics, guest headshot references, sponsor slide layouts, and winter series visual mood.
